design_principles: Real product UI is proof; never recreate it.
Exact copy and real logo are rendered by code.
Dark uses near-black surfaces with restrained violet; light is clean, high-contrast and not hazy.
One dominant focal point per slide.
No generic quote-card or fake-dashboard composition.

layouts.structure: Headline and supporting copy occupy the left two-fifths. One real mobile screenshot is dominant on the right. Small logo header and compact CTA footer.
constraints: The headline may not overlap the screenshot.

layouts.structure: A large, truthful screenshot crop is centered inside a restrained frame. A short headline is above it; one single callout may name the visible module.
constraints: Callout must describe visible UI truthfully.
No heavy glow or decorative device mockup.

layouts.purpose: Belief/pain slide or bridge slide when no screenshot is needed.
layouts.structure: Large product-led headline with deliberate negative space, real logo, and one restrained brand shape or approved supporting visual. No fake product UI.
constraints: This is not a generic motivational quote card.
Use a supporting visual only when it adds meaning.

layouts.purpose: Educational carousel sequence with a clear story.
layouts.structure: Four related but non-duplicate slides: hook, concept, product proof, CTA. Use at least two distinct real states where product proof is required.
constraints: Do not repeat the same screenshot as dominant hero on all slides.
Use editorial_statement for a bridge rather than inventing UI.
